Home/Resources/For Employers

Hire Nepali Workers

Tell us your requirements. We source, screen, train and deploy the right workforce for you.

Why Partner With Us

Your Trusted Recruitment Partner in Nepal

We have 30 years of experience supplying quality Nepali manpower to Gulf, Malaysia, and Japan. Our compliance, documentation, and deployment process is fully managed for you.

Fast Turnaround
We deploy within your timeline with 48-hour advance notice before each departure.
Pre-screened Candidates
All applicants go through our multi-stage screening and trade test process.
Full Documentation
We handle all Nepal-side legal documents — demand letters, MOL approvals, contracts.
Any Country
We are licensed to deploy to Gulf, Malaysia, Japan, South Korea and beyond.
Replacement Guarantee
If a worker cannot perform, we manage replacements as per our service agreement.

Post Your Requirement

Our team will respond within 1–2 working days with a tailored proposal.

Company Information
Manpower Requirements
Sunkoshi Manpower

Nepal's trusted recruitment agency since 1995. Connecting skilled Nepali workers with world-class employers globally.
